changes.check: 2B — Regression targets present and testable
changes.citation: prompt:263-292 — four regression categories: Unit Normalisation (hba1c %, hba1c mmol/mol, no glucose/lipid regression), Arbitration (single id, both ids, only hba1c_pct), Layer B (no duplicate signal/burden contribution), Determinism (same input -> same output)

changes.check: 2B — STOP conditions reviewed; no STOP condition currently triggered
changes.citation: STOP1: seam confirmed at analysis.py:129-142. STOP2: canonical id stays hba1c. STOP3: user-visible retention possible (hba1c_pct can remain in raw/results layers; gate only removes from Layer B-bound set). STOP4: no downstream contract broken by suppressing hba1c_pct from analytics only. STOP5: no second authority introduced. STOP6: no orchestrator/signal evaluator/insight graph redesign needed. STOP7: factor computable from SSOT (see determinism risk below).

changes.check: 2B — DETERMINISM RISK SURFACED: conversion factor accuracy (mmol/mol -> %)
changes.citation: units.yaml:109-113 uses simple linear factor 10.929 for % -> mmol/mol. Clinically accurate IFCC-NGSP reverse formula is NGSP% = (IFCC_mmol_mol / 10.929) + 2.15. Simple reciprocal (1/10.929 = 0.09150) omits +2.15 offset and will produce clinically wrong Layer B values (e.g. 48 mmol/mol -> 4.39% instead of 6.54%). Cursor MUST either: (a) implement full IFCC formula with offset, or (b) explicitly declare the SSOT is using a linear approximation by design and the +2.15 offset is intentionally excluded. This must be resolved before Phase 1 execution. STOP7 is proximate if (b) cannot be justified.

changes.check: 2B — Arbitration gate must not remove UNIT_NORMALISATION_META_KEY
changes.citation: analysis.py:153-156 — UNIT_NORMALISATION_META_KEY set AFTER apply_unit_normalisation. Arbitration gate is inserted BEFORE apply_unit_normalisation (lines 138-142). Key is not yet set when gate runs; no risk of accidental removal.

changes.check: 2B — All 7 STOP conditions evaluated; none triggered (subject to STOP7 determinism risk resolution)
changes.citation: See STOP conditions review at 2B-STOP check above. STOP7 requires Cursor to resolve conversion formula choice explicitly.

content_review: COMPLETE — backend/ssot/units.yaml read (lines 1-150). percent_to_mmol_mol defined at line 109-113. No mmol_mol_to_percent entry present. Sprint adds this entry. No other HbA1c content in units.yaml. biomarkers.yaml hba1c (L191) and hba1c_pct (L1602) both have unit:'%'. No content drift from sprint scope.
behaviour_review: COMPLETE — MIXED correct: units.yaml addition = CONTENT; registry.py conversion branch addition + analysis.py arbitration gate = BEHAVIOUR. Determinism preserved for arbitration (gate is deterministic: always removes hba1c_pct from Layer B-bound set when present). Conversion determinism conditional on resolution of STOP7 risk (linear vs IFCC formula). Regression targets explicit and testable. Output structure unchanged for downstream consumers (hba1c still the sole Layer B HbA1c). No hidden side effects identified in orchestrator, signal evaluator, or insight graph paths.
